svg.text: What aiorch run pipeline.yaml actually does, in six deliberately narrow stages.

g.text: independent steps on the same layer
Walks the DAG layer by layer.
fan a step over a list
append-only during a run · queryable mid-flight
Narrow boundaries by design. Each stage is a pure function of the previous stage's output. The DAG builder doesn't know about primitives; primitives don't know about the DAG.
That's what makes the runtime small, testable, and — for the commercial Platform — portable to a distributed executor fleet without re-writing the core.
